headline: The Safest Dividend Plays of 2026: 5 High-Yield, Low-PE Dividend Aristocrats
summary: The S&P 500 is up about 10% this year, yet 80% of that gain comes from technology stocks, many of which are tied to artificial intelligence. With interest rates and energy prices spiraling higher, and inflation clearly not under control, those willing to put any new money to work in stocks should likely be extremely ... headline: Genuine Parts: Deconsolidation Further Increases The Risk
summary: Genuine Parts remains a market leader with strong brands but faces rising costs, margin compression, and cyclicality. Read why GPC stock is a Hold.
